chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 650 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13.06.2023 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Sarfraz A. Akhund, Advocate for Respondent No.6 along with Ghulam Akber, Administrator, Town Committee, Hingorja Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< A statement has been filed by learned AAG Sindh, which is taken on record, copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioners. Simultaneously, Administrator, Town Committee, Hingorja has filed his statement together with Cheque # 39466804 dated 06.06.2023 for an amount of Rs.50000/-, which has been handed over to the Counsel for the petitioners, who has acknowledged its receipt. We notice that this case more or less has been decided with the respondents acknowledging liability of Rs.698,935/-. It has also been reflected by the respondents counsel that the amount to be paid in installments of Rs.50000/- per month. We are not inclined to let this file stay alive on the docket of cases as it appears that merely for the deposit of Rs.50000/- every month, this case has been put up for hearing, prima-facie, this is not the role of the High Court. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of in the above terms with direction to the respondents to comply with the representation which they have given earlier, which is recorded above in this order. Judge Judge ARBROHI
